serviceNotes.engine oil: S54 M engine: shorter oil intervals than standard E46 (often 15,000 km / 12 months EU); track use ~8,000 km. Sources: BMW M E46 maintenance supplement.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; more often on track cars.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Six plugs; high-performance interval ~45,000–60,000 km—confirm M table.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Performance brakes: inspect at least every 15,000 km.
serviceNotes.SMG gearbox fluid: E46 M3 with SMG-II: hydraulic fluid and actuator service at ~60,000 km for shift quality.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: E46 M3 6-speed manual: gear oil replacement at ~60,000 km.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: High-rev engine: ~100,000 km preventive coolant service.
serviceNotes.valve adjustment: S54 uses solid lifters; BMW specifies valve clearance checks—verify interval for your model (CSL vs standard).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 (S54) maintenance supplement — Oil Service 15,000 km and 12 months (M cars; stricter than standard E46); track/heavy use shorter (file REC 8,000 km)
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — cabin microfilter per M maintenance schedule (~30,000 km typical cadence vs standard E46 Inspection II spacing)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4); more frequent if track use
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — engine air filter service interval per M supplement (~30,000 km; high-flow intake — confirm booklet)
serviceSources.spark plugs: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 (S54) — high-performance spark plugs; file 45,000 km per M maintenance table (non-M E46 petrol often 60,000 km)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — brake inspection at least every 15,000 km (performance brakes)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — brake inspection at least every 15,000 km
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 M3 — M-specific inspection interval; file 30,000 km (shorter than 60,000 km standard E46 vehicle check)
serviceSources.SMG gearbox fluid: BMW specialist consensus (SMG-II hydraulic unit); SMG fluid/service ~60,000 km for shift quality — confirm workshop literature
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW specialist consensus; M3 manual gearbox oil ~60,000 km preventive — OEM often conservative wording in supplement
serviceSources.differential fluids: BMW specialist consensus; M limited-slip differential fluid ~60,000 km preventive
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual / M supplement coolant change interval; file 100,000 km preventive for high-rev S54 — confirm booklet
serviceSources.valve adjustment: BMW workshop literature S54 solid lifters — valve clearance inspection interval varies by model year (CSL vs standard); verify TIS / service manual
